title: My Work Capabilities
excerpt: I would love to see My Work have the capability to print out like other boards are able too. Also to export it as an Excel Sheet. I have some employees who like to have a paper copy of their work at this would be so much…

posts.author: Anya (Anya Lind)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see My Work have the capability to print out like other boards are able too. Also to export it as an Excel Sheet. I have some employees who like to have a paper copy of their work at this would be so much easier than having to screenshot and print or going to each board individually.
